description: Door gasket shows visible gaps, tears, or deformation allowing warm air infiltration
visual_signals: visible gap between door and frame

description: Ice accumulation on floor surfaces creating slip and fall hazard for personnel
Shelves and racks overpacked obstructing airflow vents and evaporator circulation
visual_signals: no visible gaps between stacked items and walls

description: Temperature display showing out-of-range reading or unit displaying error code
visual_signals: digital display with high temperature value
blank or error screen on thermometer

description: Racking uprights bent, beams deformed, or safety clips missing from forklift impact damage
Emergency release handle inside walk-in is obstructed, unlabeled, or not visible
visual_signals: product stacked in front of release handle

description: Lighting inside cold storage unit is failed, flickering, or insufficient for safe operations
Condensation or water pooling at door threshold creating slip hazard and ice formation risk
Raw food products stored above cooked or ready-to-eat items risking cross-contamination
visual_signals: raw meat on upper shelf above prepared food
uncovered raw product dripping onto items below

description: Personnel inside cold storage without required PPE such as thermal gloves or insulated clothing
visual_signals: worker in short sleeves inside freezer
